en.extract:
The parrot-billed seedeater (Sporophila peruviana) is a small species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in various shrubby habitats in western Ecuador and western Peru. Outside the breeding season, it is quite social and frequently seen in flocks with other small seed-eating birds.

The '''parrot-billed seedeater''' ('''''Sporophila peruviana''''') is a small species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in various [[Shrubland|shrubby]] habitats in western [[Ecuador]] and western [[Peru]]. Outside the breeding season, it is quite social and frequently seen in flocks with other small seed-eating birds.
